chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-177 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.2216/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 6. 3. For orders on CMA No.873/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2026. Mr. Ismail Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. After making certain preliminary submissions, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petition is not being pressed any further. Under such circumstances, the instant Petition stands dismissed accordingly alongwith other pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
